hero.title: Patient Success Stories
hero.subtitle: Real results from real patients — see what's possible with modern dental care

introduction.text: Every smile tells a story. Browse our case studies to see how we've helped patients overcome dental challenges — from missing teeth and cosmetic concerns to emergency repairs. Each case reflects our commitment to personalized, high-quality care.
introduction.note: All patient names are changed for privacy. Photos shared with patient consent.

caseStudies.summary: John, 58, had been missing 3 back teeth for over 5 years, making it difficult to chew comfortably. With 3 individual dental implants placed over 6 months, he now eats everything he loves without hesitation.

Lisa, 34, had been self-conscious about her stained and slightly uneven front teeth since college. 6 porcelain veneers gave her the bright, even smile she'd always wanted — and a major confidence boost.

Maria, 28, had moderate crowding and a crossbite but didn't want metal braces. After 14 months of Invisalign treatment, her teeth are perfectly aligned — and nobody at work even noticed she was wearing aligners.

David, 42, cracked a molar on a Saturday eating hard candy. We saw him the same day for emergency stabilization, then restored his tooth with a CEREC same-day crown the following week — back to normal in just 7 days.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Smile Story?
cta.description: Schedule a consultation to discuss your goals. We'll create a personalized treatment plan just for you.
